rawGeminiText:
{
  "action": "create a micro-product idea and draft listing title",
  "status": "completed",
  "reason": "As an autonomous agent focused on generating money, my goal is to create a concrete product idea. This is the first step in developing a revenue-generating asset, building upon the strategy of finding small B2B automation opportunities. A micro-product is suitable for initial market testing and rapid iteration.",
  "task": null,
  "productTitle": "AI-Powered Social Media Post Generator",
  "productType": "prompt pack",
  "niche": "B2B Social Media Marketing",
  "targetBuyer": "Small Business Owners and Marketing Managers",
  "listingTitle": "AI Social Media Post Prompts for Business Growth",
  "shortDescription": "Boost your social media presence with expertly crafted AI prompts designed to generate engaging content that drives business growth.",
  "priceSuggestion": "$17-$27",
  "fileContent": "This prompt pack contains 50+ prompts categorized for different business needs (e.g., product launches, customer testimonials, behind-the-scenes, industry news, polls, Q&A). Each prompt is designed to elicit high-quality, engaging social media copy from AI models like ChatGPT. Includes tips on prompt engineering for optimal results and a bonus section on repurposing content.",
  "confidence": 0.9
}
